zh.lifeSummary: 當Lady Beatrice de Mandeville於大約1105年出生在法國巴-諾門迪卡爾瓦多斯曼德維爾--辛時，她的父親William de Mandeville Constable at the Tower in London44歲，母親Margaret Rie30歲。她於大約1134年與Guillaume de SAY在英國艾可結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1174年在英國英格蘭享年70歲，埋葬在英國。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Lady Beatrice de Mandeville于大约1105年出生在法国巴-諾門迪卡爾瓦多斯曼德維爾--辛时，她的父亲William de Mandeville Constable at the Tower in London44岁，母亲Margaret Rie30岁。她于大约1134年与Guillaume de SAY在英国艾可结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于1174年在英国英格兰享年70岁，埋葬在英国。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.
Indian: variant of   Dey  .

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Mandeville
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Marcel, Andre, Armand, Gabrielle, Camille, Emile, Fernand, Fernande, Gaston, Jean-Paul, Lucien, Michel.

French: habitational name from Mandeville, the name of two places in Normandy, derived from Latin magna villa ‘large estate’, or a variant of Manneville, a habitational name from Manneville, the name of several places in Normandy (see 2 below). Compare Montville and Monville .
English (of Norman origin): habitational name from Manneville (Seine-Maritime, Calvados), Manneville-sur-Risle (Eure), or Magneville (Manche).

variants.name: Mansfield
meanings: English: habitational name from a place so named in Nottinghamshire. The placename means ‘open land by the river Maun’, from the river name Maun (which may take its name from a hill named with Old English mamme ‘teat’) + Old English feld ‘open country’.
Irish (Waterford): when not an importation of 1, this is an altered form of the Norman name de Manville (see Mandeville 3).
Americanized form of German and Jewish (Ashkenazic) Mansfeld, a habitational name from a place so called in Saxony.

variants.name: Manderville
meanings: English (of Norman origin): variant of   Mandeville  .

variants.name: Manwell
meanings: English and Scottish: variant of   Mandeville  .

variants.name: Manville
meanings: English (Sussex and Lancashire): variant of   Mandeville  .
Altered form of   Mainville   1, a surname of Swiss French origin (see   Miville  ).
French: variant of Menville, a habitational name from Menville in Haute-Garonne, and also of Mainville 2.

variants.name: Mundell
meanings: Scottish (of Norman origin): variant of   Mandeville  .
Americanized form of German Mündel (or some other similar, like-sounding surname): nickname for someone with a prominent mouth, from Middle High German munt, mündelīn ‘(little) mouth’.

variants.name: Monville
meanings: Altered form of French   Mandeville  .
Walloon: habitational name from Monville in Namur province in Wallonia (Belgium), of the same etymology as in 3 below.
In some cases possibly also French: habitational name from Montville in Seine-Maritime or Monville in Calvados, both named with Old French mont ‘mountain, hill’ + ville ‘settlement’.

variants.name: Mandal
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Chandi, Sanjay, Sankar, Somnath, Aditi, Aditya, Ajit, Amala, Amitabha, Anil, Anirudh, Aparna.
Indian (northern states): from Sanskrit maṇḍala, a word that has several meanings, including ‘sphere’ and ‘halo’.
English (Cumbria; of Norman origin): variant of   Mandeville  .

variants.name: Montville
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Emile, Vernice.
Altered form of French   Mandeville  .
French: variant of   Monville  . This surname is very rare in France, found mainly in Creuse.

variants.name: Manfull
meanings: English (Midlands): probably a variant of   Mandeville  . Compare   Manville  .

nameMeanings.name: Beatrice
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: and French form of   Beatrix  , which was quite popular in England during the Middle Ages, and strongly revived in the 19th century. It is most famous as the name of Dante's beloved, and is borne by the elder (  b. 1988 ) of the Duke of York's daughters.

historicEvents.title: The Battle of Tichebray
historicEvents.description: King Henry I defeated and captured his brother, Robert of Normandy, at the Battle of Tinchebray in 1106. Robert remained in captivity until his death in 1134.

en.lifeSummary: When Lady Beatrice de Mandeville was born about 1105, in Mandeville-en-Bessin, Calvados, Lower Normandy, France, her father, William de Mandeville Constable at the Tower in London, was 44 and her mother, Margaret Rie, was 30. She married Guillaume de SAY about 1134, in Essex, England. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 1 daughter. She died in 1174, in England, United Kingdom, at the age of 70, and was buried in England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Lady Beatrice de Mandeville est née environ 1105, à Mandeville-en-Bessin, Calvados, Basse-Normandie, France, son père, William de Mandeville Constable at the Tower in London, avait 44 ans et sa mère, Margaret Rie, avait 30 ans. Elle a épousé Guillaume de SAY environ 1134, à Essex, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée en 1174, à Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 70 ans, et a été enterrée à Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Lady Beatrice de Mandeville um 1105 in Mandeville-en-Bessin, Calvados, Basse-Normandie, Frankreich geboren wurde, war ihr Vater William de Mandeville Constable at the Tower in London 44 und ihre Mutter Margaret Rie 30. Sie hat um 1134 in Essex, England Guillaume de SAY geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Sie starb 1174 im Alter von 70 Jahren in England, United Kingdom und wurde in England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Lady Beatrice de Mandeville è nata il circa 1105 nel Mandeville-en-Bessin, Calvados, Basse-Normandie, Francia, sua padre, William de Mandeville Constable at the Tower in London, aveva 44 anni e sua madre, Margaret Rie, aveva 30 anni. Lei sposato Guillaume de SAY circa 1134, nel Essex, England. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 1 figlia. Morì nel 1174, nel Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 70 anni, e fu sepolta a England.

ja.lifeSummary: Lady Beatrice de Mandevilleが約1105年にフランスバセ-ノーマンディカルヴァドスマンデヴィレ-エン-ベシンで生まれた時，父William de Mandeville Constable at the Tower in Londonは44歳，母Margaret Rieは30歳であった。約1134年にイギリスエセックスでGuillaume de SAYと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1174年にイギリスイギリスで70歳で死去し，イギリスにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Lady Beatrice de Mandeville(이)가 대략 1105년 프랑스 배세-노먼디 캘바도스 먼데비레--베신에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 William de Mandeville Constable at the Tower in London(은)는 44세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Margaret Rie(은)는 30세였다. 그녀는 대략 1134년 영국 에세스에서 Guillaume de SAY(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1174년 영국 잉글랜드에서 70세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Lady Beatrice de Mandeville nasceu aproximadamente 1105, em Mandeville-en-Bessin, Calvados, Basse-Normandie, França, seu pai, William de Mandeville Constable at the Tower in London, tinha 44 anos e sua mãe, Margaret Rie, tinha 30 anos. Ela casou-se com Guillaume de SAY aproximadamente 1134, em Essex, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 1 filha. Ela faleceu em 1174, em Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 70 anos, e foi sepultada em Inglaterra.

ro.Great Waltham, Essex, England: Great Waltham, Essex, Anglia, United Kingdom

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Lady Beatrice de Mandeville родилась около 1105 г. в местности мандевилле-ен-бессин, калвадос, бассе-норманди, Франция, её отцу по имени William de Mandeville Constable at the Tower in London было 44 года, а матери, которую звали Margaret Rie, 30. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Guillaume de SAY около 1134 г. в местности эссекс, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 1 дочь. Она умерла в 1174 г. в местности Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 70 лет и была похоронена в местности Англия.
